askCmdr.title: Ask Cmdr

@askCmdr.title.description: Title of the Ask Cmdr chat rail, where the user chats with an AI about their files. This is the product name; keep it as-is.

@askCmdr.close.description: Accessible label for the button that closes the Ask Cmdr chat rail. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.newChat.description: Label for the button that starts a fresh Ask Cmdr conversation. Sentence case.

askCmdr.empty.title: Ask about your files

@askCmdr.empty.title.description: Heading of the Ask Cmdr rail's empty state, shown before the first message. Sentence case.

askCmdr.empty.hint: Cmdr can look at what you’re browsing, your drives, and your file history to answer. It only reads names, paths, and sizes, never file contents.

@askCmdr.empty.hint.description: Explanatory text in the Ask Cmdr rail's empty state, describing what the assistant can see. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

@askCmdr.composer.placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the Ask Cmdr message input box. Ends with an ellipsis character (…).

@askCmdr.composer.send.description: Accessible label for the button that sends the typed Ask Cmdr message. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.composer.stop.description: Label for the button that stops the assistant while it is answering. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.thinking.description: Shown while the assistant is reasoning before it starts replying. Ends with an ellipsis character (…).

askCmdr.softCap.message: This chat is getting long. A fresh one keeps replies fast and focused.

@askCmdr.softCap.message.description: A gentle nudge shown once an Ask Cmdr conversation grows past its soft length cap. Friendly, not a hard limit.

@askCmdr.softCap.action.description: Button that starts a new Ask Cmdr conversation, shown alongside the getting-long nudge. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.tool.appState.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant reading the user's current view (open folders, cursor, selection). Shown while the tool runs. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.tool.appState.done: Looked at what you’re looking at

@askCmdr.tool.appState.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant read the user's current view. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.tool.listDir.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant listing a folder's contents and size. Shown while the tool runs.

@askCmdr.tool.listDir.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant listed a folder.

@askCmdr.tool.largestDirs.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant finding the biggest subfolders by size.

@askCmdr.tool.largestDirs.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant found the biggest subfolders.

@askCmdr.tool.importantFolders.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant finding the user's most important folders.

@askCmdr.tool.importantFolders.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant found the user's most important folders.

@askCmdr.tool.folderImportance.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant scoring how important one folder is. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.tool.folderImportance.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant scored a folder's importance. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.tool.listVolumes.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant listing the user's drives and their index freshness.

@askCmdr.tool.listVolumes.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant listed the user's drives.

@askCmdr.tool.operationsList.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant searching the operation log (past copies, moves, deletes, renames).

@askCmdr.tool.operationsList.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant searched the operation log.

@askCmdr.tool.operationsGet.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant reading one logged file operation's detail.

@askCmdr.tool.operationsGet.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant read one file operation's detail.

@askCmdr.tool.unknown.doing.description: Present-tense fallback status for a tool the rail doesn't have a specific label for.

@askCmdr.tool.unknown.done.description: Past-tense fallback label for a tool the rail doesn't have a specific label for.

@askCmdr.tool.refused.description: Shown on a tool line when the assistant asked for something Ask Cmdr can't do (it's read-only). The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.noKey: Add your API key in settings to start chatting.

@askCmdr.error.noKey.description: Shown when the chosen AI provider has no API key. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.notConfigured: Turn on an AI provider in settings to use Ask Cmdr.

@askCmdr.error.notConfigured.description: Shown when no AI provider is set up. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.unavailable: Couldn’t reach the AI provider. Check your connection and try again.

@askCmdr.error.unavailable.description: Shown when the AI provider is unreachable. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.timeout: That took too long. Try again?

@askCmdr.error.timeout.description: Shown when the AI request timed out. Friendly; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.authFailed: The provider didn’t accept your API key. Check it in settings.

@askCmdr.error.authFailed.description: Shown when the provider rejected the API key. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.rateLimited: The provider is busy or you’re out of quota. Try again in a bit.

@askCmdr.error.rateLimited.description: Shown when the provider is rate-limiting or the account is out of quota. Friendly; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.budgetExhausted: This one hit its limit before finishing. Try asking something more specific.

@askCmdr.error.budgetExhausted.description: Shown when a single answer used up its tool-step or time budget before finishing. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.unfinishedReply: The reply didn’t finish. Try again?

@askCmdr.error.unfinishedReply.description: Shown when the reply stream stopped before completing (a provider drop or a crash). Friendly; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.provider: Something went wrong on the provider’s side. Try again?

@askCmdr.error.provider.description: Shown for any other provider-side problem. Friendly; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.
